summary_content_short: Bridging AI & Business Analytics — MSc in AI @ HKUST | BSc in BIDA @ UM
summary_content: Master's student in Artificial Intelligence at the Hong Kong University of Science and Technology, with solid expertise in AI and hands-on Big 4 consulting experience. Excel at bridging technical AI solutions with real business scenarios, adept at client requirement alignment, cross-stakeholder collaboration and end-to-end consulting delivery; equipped with structured analytical thinking and executive-level deliverable design skills, capable of translating complex Gen-AI concepts into actionable business insights.
hero_subheadline: AI & BA | AI frontier-focused, tech and application savvy
edu_hkust_course: Core courses: Foundation Models and Gen AI, Advanced Python for AI, AI in Software Engineering, Reinforcement Learning, AI Foundations, Medical Image Analysis...
edu_um_deg: BSc in Business Intelligence and Data Analytics
edu_um_course: Core courses: Machine Learning for Business, Business Data Mining and Visualization, Forecasting Models in Business, Cyber Security and Blockchain, Financial Management...
edu_um_honor: Dean's Honors' List; AACSB student representative.
exp_ey_p1_title: Bank Credit Card Limit & Approval Advisory
exp_ey_p1_d1: Aligned with banking client's risk and compliance requirements, collaborated with algorithm and R&D teams to drive end-to-end delivery of risk control strategy and AI-enabled model solutions (Python, SQL).
exp_ey_p1_d2: Developed multi-dimensional risk feature variables compliant with financial regulatory requirements, designed customer segmentation framework using pyramid model and decision trees, and built pre-loan anti-fraud risk control workflows covering multi-borrower analysis, risk scoring, device fraud detection, and PBOC credit data.
exp_ey_p1_d3: Built and validated income prediction models (XGBoost, multiclass logistic regression) by prioritizing salary, provident fund, and social insurance data; developed full-lifecycle credit scoring cards (A-card, behavior card, in-loan value card) with WOE encoding, IV filtering, and reject inference.
exp_ey_p1_d4: Supported model deployment, ongoing performance monitoring (AUC/KS, PSI), and compliance reporting; produced statistical and vintage reports.
exp_ey_p2_d1: Delivered regulatory-compliant customer segmentation based on account activities, user behaviors, and asset characteristics; designed multiple marketing events covering transactional, behavioral, and cyclical scenarios.
exp_ey_p2_d2: Developed feature variables to support dynamic strategy adaptation; set up app tracking and SMS/Push interfaces for real-time event triggering; quantified event effectiveness via A/B testing using conversion rate and LIFT metrics.
exp_ey_p2_d3: Designed compliance anti-disturbance mechanism (customer active periods, do-not-disturb rules, event cooldown) balancing conversion efficiency with optimal customer experience.
exp_ey_p3_title: Full Lifecycle Service Solution for Sci-Tech Enterprises
exp_ey_p3_d1: Integrated multi-source data (policy tags, business/tax info, patent databases, venture capital events) to construct a comprehensive sci-tech enterprise lifecycle evaluation model; segmented development stages using financing rounds, years since establishment, and patent count.
exp_ey_p3_d2: Built risk early warning model by integrating legal disputes, administrative penalties, and credit records; designed dynamic credit granting model differentiating limits and rates based on growth stages and risk scorecards.
exp_ey_p3_d3: Designed bank-linkage risk sharing mechanism and "equity + debt" hybrid financing solutions; formulated loan-investment linkage strategies and product matching rules.
exp_ey_p3_d4: Developed visualization tools using Tableau to display enterprise lifecycle distribution, risk heatmaps, and product deployment effectiveness.
exp_esg_p1_d1: Responsible for web scraping on Wind platform and public sources to compile supplier profiles, implementing Python scripts for automated data cleansing and normalization.
exp_esg_p1_d2: Structured relational database schemas in Microsoft Access, organizing supply chain information into standardized categories for traceability.
exp_esg_p1_d3: Established centralized database infrastructure to support trade association needs for supplier verification and procurement analysis.
exp_esg_p2_d1: Contributed to multidimensional data collection on administrative penalties, environmental fines, litigation cases, annual reports, ESG reports, carbon reduction, pollutant emissions, and employee welfare for listed companies.
exp_esg_p2_d2: Applied "China ESG Social Contribution Measurement Guidelines" to convert qualitative ESG impacts (e.g., pollution reduction, employee welfare) into quantifiable indicators.
exp_esg_p2_d3: Utilized Python and Excel for cross-provincial/yearly benchmarking of corporate social contributions.
proj_p1_title: Multi Agent based DeFi Audit System
proj_p1_summary: Webank Capstone | Full business loop design for DeFi security audit.
proj_p1_d1: Contributed to building a multi-agent DeFi price manipulation security audit system, designed the full business loop covering attack data enhancement, PoC code generation, contract vulnerability analysis, and bilingual audit report delivery.
proj_p1_d2: Responsible for the design and implementation of the system's core audit module, completed in-depth analysis of contract vulnerability logic and bilingual audit report generation.
proj_p1_d3: Participated in LLM-powered attack event data enhancement and automated PoC code generation.
proj_p2_summary: High-risk compliance RAG pipeline | Reducing hallucinations in regulated industry.
proj_p2_d1: Developed and optimized full RAG pipeline (retrieve-rerank-generate) for high-risk compliance scenarios, targeting the core challenge of LLM hallucinations in regulated industry applications.
proj_p2_d2: Implemented evidence-constrained generation and context-aware prompting strategies; injected reranked evidence explicitly into system prompts to improve factual consistency and answer precision.
proj_p2_d3: Introduced multi-answer generation and confidence ranking mechanism for robustness analysis; achieved higher contextual precision than baseline using a smaller model.
proj_p3_title: Ablation Study on Extended SFT + GRPO
proj_p3_summary: Mathematical Reasoning LLMs | Balancing model performance and cost.
proj_p3_d1: Conducted systematic empirical research on LLM training pipelines including extended SFT, GRPO reinforcement learning, reward function design (format, binary accuracy, cosine similarity, length penalty), and LoRA fine-tuning.
proj_p3_d2: Revealed functional separation: SFT maximizes accuracy while GRPO primarily improves token efficiency; prolonged SFT (10–20 epochs) pushes model accuracy to its upper bound and improves reasoning stability.
proj_p3_d3: Demonstrated that cosine similarity rewards outperform binary accuracy, and combining cosine reward with length penalty yields the best accuracy-efficiency trade-off; LoRA (rank=32) achieves performance close to full-parameter GRPO with significantly reduced training cost.
proj_p4_summary: PwC Capstone | JIRA-based compliance management tool delivery.
proj_p4_d1: Aligned with regulatory and client compliance standards, designed and delivered JIRA-based compliance management tool under the guidance of PwC team (SQL, Java, Power BI, Visio).
proj_p4_d2: Developed a JIRA plugin, customizing cybersecurity report templates (HTML, CSS) and dashboards (Power BI) for PwC's Cybersecurity Department and supervision agencies.
proj_p4_d3: Extracted JIRA data via Java and Rest API, cleaned and analyzed with SQL, DAX, and Python; mined incident causes to enhance security monitoring; prepared system proposals, data flow diagrams, and user manuals.
early_p1_title: MCM/ICM: Great Lakes Water Level Optimization
early_p1_d1: Built a water level management model using network flow and AHP, balancing economic, environmental, and social impacts for resource business decisions.
early_p1_d2: Combined PID control and genetic algorithms adapting to business demands and climate variation; simulated snowmelt and precipitation effects with the SWAT model.
early_p2_title: Data Mining & Customer Segmentation with R
early_p2_d1: Cleaned and feature-engineered retail customer data, utilized SVM, random forest to forecast sale behaviors, evaluated with cross validation, ROC curves, and AUC.
early_p2_d2: Used Apriori to mine frequent itemset, optimizing product bundling and layout; generated segmentation insights with ggplot2 and seaborn.
early_p3_d1: Engineered a decentralized luxury supply chain platform using blockchain for product lifecycle tracking.
early_p3_d2: Utilized encryption and digital signatures for privacy and integrity in second-hand trade.
extras_interest_content: Technology trends, automobiles, consumer electronics, music, movies, singing, badminton, and swimming.
